# Taquería Los Panditas — Salem, OR
> Taquería Los Panditas is an authentic Mexican restaurant in Salem, Oregon — tacos, burritos, tortas and more, made fresh. Dine in, take out or catering. Bilingual (English/Spanish). 3892 State St. Call (503) 365-8226. An East Salem taquería on State St — fresh tacos, burritos and aguas, dine in or take out.

## Services
- Tacos
- Burritos
- Tortas
- Combo Plates
- Drinks & Aguas
- Take-out & Catering

## Service area
- Salem, Keizer, West Salem, Marion County (ZIPs: 97301)

## Contact
- Call/text: (503) 365-8226 · Hours: Daily 9am–10pm · Languages: English, Español

## FAQ
### Do you have vegetarian options?
Yes &mdash; we have veggie tacos, burritos and sides. Just ask.

### Do you do take-out and catering?
We do &mdash; order ahead for pickup, and ask about party trays for events.

### What are your hours?
See our hours below &mdash; and call ahead if you'd like your order ready.

### Do you speak Spanish?
&iexcl;Claro! We take your order in English or Spanish.

### Do you take cards?
Yes &mdash; cash and cards are both welcome.
